languages.text: {n}Эоганн благоговейно спускается ниже, почти касаясь пола, и складывает руки в жесте почтения.{/n} "Сия машина — прародитель толкователя, что мы использовали на Амсанкте. Если бы мы обладали всей полнотой знаний, что он постиг, кто знает, может быть все обернулось бы иначе. Впрочем, моя сентиментальность плохо коррелирует со статистическими вероятностями".

{n}Eogunn reverently descends lower, almost touching the floor, and folds his hands in a gesture of respect.{/n} "This machine is the forebear of the Elucidator we employed on Amsanct. Had we possessed the full scope of knowledge that it comprehended, who knows, perhaps everything would have turned out differently. However, my sentimentality correlates poorly with statistical probabilities."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн благоговейно спускается ниже, почти касаясь пола, и складывает руки в жесте почтения.{/n} "Сия машина — прародитель толкователя, что мы использовали на Амсанкте. Если бы мы обладали всей полнотой знаний, что он постиг, кто знает, может быть все обернулось бы иначе. Впрочем, моя сентиментальность плохо коррелирует со статистическими вероятностями".

However, my sentimentality correlates poorly with statistical probabilities."

{n}Eogunn reverently descends lower, almost touching the floor, and folds his hands in a gesture of respect.{/n} "This machine is the forebear of the Elucidator we employed on Amsanct. Had we possessed the full scope of knowledge that it comprehended, who knows, perhaps everything would have turned out differently. However, my sentimentality correlates poorly with statistical probabilities."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn desciende con veneración hasta casi tocar el suelo y une las manos en señal de respeto.{/n} «Esta máquina es la antecesora del Dilucidador que usábamos en Amsanct. De haber poseído todo el conocimiento que comprendía, ¿quién sabe? Puede que todo hubiera sucedido de otra forma. No obstante, mi sentimentalismo no se corresponde muy bien con las probabilidades estadísticas».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn reverently descends lower, almost touching the floor, and folds his hands in a gesture of respect.{/n} "This machine is the forebear of the Elucidator we employed on Amsanct. Had we possessed the full scope of knowledge that it comprehended, who knows, perhaps everything would have turned out differently. However, my sentimentality correlates poorly with statistical probabilities."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn desciende con veneración hasta casi tocar el suelo y une las manos en señal de respeto.{/n} «Esta máquina es la antecesora del Dilucidador que usábamos en Amsanct. De haber poseído todo el conocimiento que comprendía, ¿quién sabe? Puede que todo hubiera sucedido de otra forma. No obstante, mi sentimentalismo no se corresponde muy bien con las probabilidades estadísticas».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡虔诚地俯下身子，几乎触到地面，双手合拢以示尊重。{/n}“这台机器，是我们曾在阿姆桑克特使用的那台阐释器的前身。如果当初我们能够掌握它所理解的全部知识……谁知道呢，也许一切都会变得不同。然而，我的多愁善感向来与统计学结果背道而驰。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn reverently descends lower, almost touching the floor, and folds his hands in a gesture of respect.{/n} "This machine is the forebear of the Elucidator we employed on Amsanct. Had we possessed the full scope of knowledge that it comprehended, who knows, perhaps everything would have turned out differently. However, my sentimentality correlates poorly with statistical probabilities."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡虔诚地俯下身子，几乎触到地面，双手合拢以示尊重。{/n}“这台机器，是我们曾在阿姆桑克特使用的那台阐释器的前身。如果当初我们能够掌握它所理解的全部知识……谁知道呢，也许一切都会变得不同。然而，我的多愁善感向来与统计学结果背道而驰。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn schwebt ehrfürchtig herunter, bis er beinahe den Boden berührt und faltet respektvoll seine Hände.{/n} "Diese Maschine ist der Vorgänger des Elucidators, den wir auf Amsanct eingesetzt haben. Hätten wir auf sein gesamtes Wissen zugreifen können, wer weiß, vielleicht wäre dann alles anders gekommen. Allerdings korreliert meine Sentimentalität nicht gut mit statistischen Wahrscheinlichkeiten."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn reverently descends lower, almost touching the floor, and folds his hands in a gesture of respect.{/n} "This machine is the forebear of the Elucidator we employed on Amsanct. Had we possessed the full scope of knowledge that it comprehended, who knows, perhaps everything would have turned out differently. However, my sentimentality correlates poorly with statistical probabilities."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn schwebt ehrfürchtig herunter, bis er beinahe den Boden berührt und faltet respektvoll seine Hände.{/n} "Diese Maschine ist der Vorgänger des Elucidators, den wir auf Amsanct eingesetzt haben. Hätten wir auf sein gesamtes Wissen zugreifen können, wer weiß, vielleicht wäre dann alles anders gekommen. Allerdings korreliert meine Sentimentalität nicht gut mit statistischen Wahrscheinlichkeiten."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn se baisse respectueusement, presque au point de toucher le sol, et replie ses mains en un geste empreint de révérence.{/n} « Cette machine est l'ancêtre de l'élucidateur que nous avons employé sur Amsanct. Si nous avions été en possession de toutes les connaissances qu'elle abrite en son sein, qui sait, tout se serait peut-être déroulé différemment. Pour autant, les probabilités statistiques corroborent rarement mon ressenti. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn reverently descends lower, almost touching the floor, and folds his hands in a gesture of respect.{/n} "This machine is the forebear of the Elucidator we employed on Amsanct. Had we possessed the full scope of knowledge that it comprehended, who knows, perhaps everything would have turned out differently. However, my sentimentality correlates poorly with statistical probabilities."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn se baisse respectueusement, presque au point de toucher le sol, et replie ses mains en un geste empreint de révérence.{/n} « Cette machine est l'ancêtre de l'élucidateur que nous avons employé sur Amsanct. Si nous avions été en possession de toutes les connaissances qu'elle abrite en son sein, qui sait, tout se serait peut-être déroulé différemment. Pour autant, les probabilités statistiques corroborent rarement mon ressenti. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn; huşu içinde eğiliyor, neredeyse yere değecek duruma geliyor ve saygıyla ellerini kavuşturuyor.{/n} "Bu makine, Amsanct'ta kullandığımız Aydınlatıcı'nın atasıdır. Kavradığı irfanın tam kapsamına sahip olsaydık... Kim bilir, belki her şey farklı olurdu. Ancak duygusallığım, istatistiksel olasılıklarla zayıf bir korelasyon gösteriyor."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn reverently descends lower, almost touching the floor, and folds his hands in a gesture of respect.{/n} "This machine is the forebear of the Elucidator we employed on Amsanct. Had we possessed the full scope of knowledge that it comprehended, who knows, perhaps everything would have turned out differently. However, my sentimentality correlates poorly with statistical probabilities."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn; huşu içinde eğiliyor, neredeyse yere değecek duruma geliyor ve saygıyla ellerini kavuşturuyor.{/n} "Bu makine, Amsanct'ta kullandığımız Aydınlatıcı'nın atasıdır. Kavradığı irfanın tam kapsamına sahip olsaydık... Kim bilir, belki her şey farklı olurdu. Ancak duygusallığım, istatistiksel olasılıklarla zayıf bir korelasyon gösteriyor."

languages.text: {n}エオグンは深く頭を下げ、床に手を置いた。敬意を表すように両手を合わせた。{/n} 「この機械は、アムサンクトで我々が用いたエルシデーターの祖先である。この機械が理解していた知識の全てを我々が持っていれば、もしかしたら全てが違っていたかもしれない。しかし、私の感情は統計的な確率と相性が悪い。」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn reverently descends lower, almost touching the floor, and folds his hands in a gesture of respect.{/n} "This machine is the forebear of the Elucidator we employed on Amsanct. Had we possessed the full scope of knowledge that it comprehended, who knows, perhaps everything would have turned out differently. However, my sentimentality correlates poorly with statistical probabilities."
